title: Cobblemon - Plant Apricorns
description: What if we could plant Apricorns on Apricorn trees?
body:
# What if...
...you could plant Apricorns on leaves in Cobblemon?

# Functionality
This mod enables players to plant Apricorns directly onto leaf blocks. Simply use (right-click) an Apricorn on any leaves block, and voilà, the Apricorn is planted on the leaves block.

# Config
- `allLeaves`: Allows planting on all types of leaves when true. By default, it's false, limiting planting to Apricorn leaves.

[Come visit us on the Discord!](https://discord.gg/WKAR27SdSv)
